caption: The video features a panel discussion on a stage with three individuals seated in wooden chairs, each equipped with microphones. The setting is illuminated by vibrant purple stage lights, creating a dynamic and engaging atmosphere. The person on the left, dressed in a white shirt, appears to be speaking animatedly, gesturing with their hands as they make a point. The individual in the middle, wearing a black t-shirt, listens attentively with their hands clasped together. On the right, another person in a suit and glasses also listens intently, contributing to the conversation. A large motherboard display is visible in front of them, suggesting the topic may be related to technology or innovation. The overall scene conveys a professional yet lively exchange of ideas.
